entry.content:
How to map a classic Goods Receipt process with integrated Quality Inspection and Deconsolidation? 

or

How to configure the Multi Stage process in Warehouse Management?

entry.title: TRM: DBT_B008 Planned outflow unexpected amount
entry.content:
Hello, SAP,

 

We have a concern with TRXN: PHONE_NUMBER1 - Cocode: LU19 (Local currency: EUR), related to Investment product type. 

 

Nominal amount: 8M USD 

Start date of the contract was December 30,DIGITS wherein the FX Rate on that day for USD/EUR is 0.ZIPCODE

Supposedly, the contract is until DIGITS. However, an early repayment was processed last June 24, DIGITS with FX rate = 0.ZIPCODE 

However, a derived business transaction DBT_B008 was posted. 

Per checking, DBT_B008 is supposed to output amount with the difference of the Local currency from the initial posting to the local currency of final payment. 

Upon computation, pls refer to attached file, the amount posted in DBT_B008 is not expected.

 

However, that seems not the expected outcome. 

 

Please see attach


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

1 Manage Financial transactions app 

Trxn number: PHONE_NUMBER1 

LU19 

 

2 Check in Treasury posting journal app 



--- Issue Date (UTC) ---
DIGITS-03-08 16:58:42 - DIGITS-03-08 16:58:42

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Valuation Category Enable Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

We are enabling batch costing. While extend the material to some plants we missed to select the field valuation type. So we issued the stock and closed all the open documents. But system not allow to activate showing error "Stock already exist"

The same scenario I tried in the Customizing server for testing purpose.

entry.title: Statistical Condition Type Not Appearing In Billing Document XML In Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

Set sales pricing procedures in SAP S/4 hana Public Cloud and in that there are multiple Statistical condition types which are not coming in Billing document XML which required to print on output

Could you please guide how to fix this issue or provide an solution.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Customer Partner Function - CDS View
entry.content:

entry.title: How to show custom field from app: supplier invoice to app: manage supplier line item
entry.content:
I would like to create a custom field in the header section of the Create Supplier Invoice app.

After posting the supplier invoice, I would like this field to be visible in the Manage Supplier Line Items app.

Could you please confirm whether this is possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition)?

entry.title: Intercompany return process steps and scope item
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I would like to know the process steps for intercompany return process in S/4 HANA public cloud.

I read one thread in which mentioned to use Scope item BKP.I am not sure if this is the correct scope item.

But details are not mentioned like which PO document type should be used, master data set-up for IC partners etc.

Can you please share the details. Thanks in Advance.

Thanks

Pavan

entry.title: Workflow for Park &app; Approve before Payment Posting
entry.content: Is there any workflow for Park & Approve before Payment Posting is done? Can we have Maker & checker for Payment rejection & Payment approval for Payment entries? We require this for normal payments not for down payment requests.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public – Display account assignment description in PO factsheet (My Inbox)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I have a question regarding Purchase Order approval via My Inbox.

In the approval process, when opening a Purchase Order from the My Inbox app (factsheet view), at item level I can see the account assignment (e.g. Cost Center / WBS element), but only the code is displayed.

My requirement is to display the description (e.g. Cost Center name or WBS description) in addition to or instead of the code, directly in the PO factsheet accessed from My Inbox.

Constraints:

  • S/4HANA Cloud Public (clean core)

  • Standard factsheet UI (no key user adaptation available in this context)

  • The field is standard (account assignment), not a custom field

Any guidance or experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Mexico Deferred Tax Procedure
entry.content:
In Mexico, business needs to transfer deferred tax. 
Based on our understanding, when the invoice is cleared, then the system can transfer deferred tax. 
However, the invoice is cleared, we cannot transfer deferred tax until the bank clearing GL account is cleared. 
the process is:
1.customer invoice
2.Manage payment advice
3.manage bank statement (this step will clear the invoice, but the bank clearing GL account will not be cleared.)
4.Clear bank clearing GL account. (The transfer defer tax will use this document posting date for exchange rate, if the bank statement posting date is different from this clearing date, it will case some troubles. we want to use the bank statement posting date as exchange rate date.)
5.Transfer deferred tax
our question is
can we ignore the step 4. clear bank clearing GL account? or how can we keep the posting date is same between step 3 and step 4?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Clarifications on use of app Create Outgoing Invoices
entry.content:
Hi!

If I use the app Create Outgoing Invoices which requires a customer account, if a change the document type to SA, would it bypass the subledger function? Or will it remain a subledger function with an SA document type transaction?

entry.title: Exploring Middleware Options for SAP Public Cloud to OFTP2 Integration
entry.content:
HI SAP Friends.

Exploring Middleware Options for SAP Public Cloud to OFTP2 Integration

In one of our current engagements with a Europe-based client, we are managing a business scenario involving approximately 35 interfaces. These interfaces are responsible for integrating the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system with an OFTP2 adapter, currently facilitated through SEEBURGER.

As part of our evaluation, we are exploring alternative solutions—either within the SAP ecosystem or through third-party applications—that can provide similar OFTP2 communication capabilities as SEEBURGER. The objective is to identify a scalable, secure, and cost-effective middleware solution that can efficiently handle multiple interfaces while ensuring compliance with OFTP2 standards.

We are particularly interested in solutions that offer:

  • Seamless integration with SAP Public Cloud
  • Native or supported OFTP2 capabilities
  • Strong monitoring and error-handling features
  • Flexibility to scale across multiple interfaces

If you have experience with similar integration scenarios or can recommend suitable alternatives, your insights would be highly valuable.

entry.title: External Sales Commission - Single Sales Deal
entry.content:
We try to set up the Process Variant of a Single Sales Deal - External Commission. Unfortunately it never gets picked up in the Contract Settlement.

We have added Pricing Condition RCD2 in the Sales Order Pricing Schema. Do we need to add an Accrual Account Key here? We have tried blank, OC1 and OC4 but non was successful.

In the Condition contract we have added RCA1 as condition Type Fixed Amount. The Business Volume Selection Criteria have been set.

We have tried partial and final settlement run. It never did pick up the value from the sales order condition entered. Condition were copied to the billing document and the billig document has been paid.

Any hints, where we might miss a step in the set up?

entry.title: Requested Delivery Date copied from Quotation to Sales Order
entry.content:
Hallo,

We are currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation project and have encountered an issue regarding the behavior of the Requested Delivery Date during document flow from Quotation to Quantity Contract to Sales Order.
When a Sales Order is created with reference to a Quantity Contract, the Requested Delivery Date from the Quotation is automatically copied to the Contract and then to Sales Order header.
Issue:
The business requirement is that the Requested Delivery Date on Sales Order header should be blank by default, so that users can manually select the appropriate date in the Sales Order.
In our process, Sales Orders are often created several weeks after the Quotation has been accepted, and therefore the date inherited from the Quotation is typically no longer relevant.
However:

  • The system always inherits the Requested Delivery Date from the predecessor without the possibility to suppress it.
  • We are not able to identify any relevant BAdI or configuration option that allows us to influence or clear this field on header level during document creation. 
  • For item level, we have identified a potentia

entry.title: Validation of document item text does not work with app "Create Supplier Invoice"
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I have created a validation rule to ensure that a line item text is entered for every document line item:

Validation works perfectly in ‘Create Incoming Invoice’ and ‘Post General Journal Entries’. However, in ‘Create Supplier Invoice’, the configured error occurs during simulation even when all line item texts have been entered:

Vendor item:

G/L item:

 

Simulation

Is this maybe a program error? Or is the validation setup incorrect?

Thank you in advance for any hint!

Best regards

Rado

entry.title: Use which business contexts for the Custom Fields in inbound delivery
entry.content:
Dear SAP,
I need to add custom fields to the Inbound Delivery but missing the way of adding custom field in the apps of inbound delivery.
Also, in app Custom Fields(Fiori ID F1481), there is no inbound-delivery relevant business context

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Inquiry Storage/Usage Space in SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

I would like to inquire where I can check the storage or system usage space in SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud.

Cloud you please advise which application or path I should use to monitor this information?

Thank you for your support.

 

Regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: Down Payment request Not Supported for fixed assets
entry.content: During the creation of a down payment request for an asset PO, we encountered an error indicating that direct posting of down payment to an asset is not supported. Kindly refer to the attached screenshot for further details.

entry.title: Our customer wants to know the 2608 Upgrade features
entry.content:
Team

While i know the answer, i still wanted to confirm if there is any tentative document on what is the potential release impact for 2608? A customer is already asking for this and i have reviewed the document here and shared we can expect RASD 6 weeks approx. prior to release of 2608 for impact assessment.  Release Schedule and Dates for 2026 | SAP Help Portal
